retry_reason: If cmpxchg fails, another release has already occurred; retrying would cause a double-release (use-after-free).
contract_summary: Put wrapper for a bpf_nf_link's net namespace reference. The function decrements the net's reference count via put_net_track, and also unregisters the netfilter hook and disables defrag. The dead flag ensures these operations are performed only once, preventing double release. The caller must not call this function after the link is detached (the .detach callback already sets dead and performs release). The net namespace reference is owned by the bpf_nf_link and is released as part of the link's destruction.
